summary: Existing generative-UI and schema-form systems validate both ends of the spectrum; the pattern's contribution is to make caching, provenance and input-triggered regeneration explicit for durable artifact-facing surfaces.

points.text: AI SDK UI maps model-selected tool results to application components, demonstrating rich per-response UI without requiring arbitrary generated markup.
JSON Forms and react-jsonschema-form demonstrate that schemas can drive forms while retaining schema-owned validation and allowing a separate presentation layer.
Generated HTML remains untrusted output; safe DOM construction, contextual encoding and sanitization are part of the pattern rather than optional hardening.
